title: Definitive Evidence Synthesis: Iterations 1-4 Hypothesis Scorecard & Paper Architecture
summary: Demo notebook for the Definitive Evidence Synthesis evaluation. Loads pre-extracted metrics from 4 iter-4 experiments, runs hypothesis scoring (H1-H5) with the original scoring logic, builds a master evidence table (11 rows), computes aggregate metrics (mean score 0.72, paper readiness 0.44), and displays gap triage. Includes 4-panel visualization: hypothesis score comparison (iter-3 vs iter-4), clustering NMI by feature set, hub ablation ratios vs controls, and evidence criteria pie chart.
